reference: Yes, I am having a significant issue involving my stomach area and I am becoming concerned. I am not pregnant at all as I had my period last month and have not been sexually active. I experience pains in the lower left side of my stomach intermittently. My stomach has recently become quite bloated, and I have tried doing abdominal exercises as well. I just need to know what can help with the issue: medications or remedies, please.
text: Yes, I am having a significant issue involving my stomach area, and I am becoming concerned. I am not pregnant at all as I had my period last month and have not been sexually active. I experience pains in the lower left side of my stomach intermittently. My stomach has recently become quite bloated and I have tried doing abdominal exercises as well. I just need to know what can help with the issue. Medication Amaze.
